title: Degrees of Separation
description: Write a program that determines how many degrees of separation apart two actors are using BFS. Given any two actors, your program should find the shortest path between them through shared movies. Each node is a person, each edge is a movie they share. Your BFS must find the shortest path.
common_mistakes: Not tracking visited nodes, causing infinite loops
Using a stack (DFS) instead of a queue (BFS), which does not guarantee shortest path
Not correctly reconstructing the path once the target is found
Returning None instead of an empty list when no path exists

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
description: Using Minimax, implement an AI to play Tic-Tac-Toe optimally. Implement the player, actions, result, winner, terminal, utility, and minimax functions in tictactoe.py. The AI should never lose.
common_mistakes: Minimax returning the wrong value for terminal states
Not handling the draw state — terminal() must return True when the board is full
Modifying the board in place instead of returning a new board from result()
Confusing which player maximizes and which minimizes
